text: Alphabet's stock has demonstrated significant outperformance relative to broader market benchmarks. Over the past 30 days, GOOGL returned approximately 7.79% compared to 0.93% for the S&P 500, generating excess returns of about 6.86%. On a one-year basis, the stock returned approximately 68.82% versus 15.35% for the benchmark, representing excess returns of roughly 53.47%. This performance reflects investor confidence in the company's AI strategy and cloud momentum heading into the Q4 earnings release, though market volatility around AI valuations has created near-term uncertainty.
